headline: Stop snacking Sunday, start rowing now
summary: Your +0.01 kg/week pace must become -0.59 kg/week; today you control eating and do the work to close that gap.
details: Sunday snacking is your biggest sabotage—commit to Huel pre-portioned meals only today (8,000–9,000 kJ max) and skip all emotional eating. Put 40 minutes on the rowing machine today with no negotiation. This single day of discipline closes your 0.60 kg/week deficit and builds momentum for the week ahead.
